issues.title: No Internet Connection - Fiber

steps.action: Check if router is powered on and all lights are normal
steps.detail: Power light should be solid green

steps.action: Check the fiber cable connection at the back of router
steps.detail: Ensure the green fiber cable is firmly plugged in

steps.action: Restart your router - unplug power, wait 30 seconds, plug back in
steps.detail: Wait 2-3 minutes for full reboot

steps.action: Check LOS light on router
steps.detail: If LOS is RED or blinking, there is a fiber line issue - call 1212

steps.action: Try connecting via ethernet cable directly
steps.detail: If ethernet works but WiFi doesn't, it's a WiFi issue

steps.action: Reset router to factory settings using pin hole button
steps.detail: Hold reset button for 10 seconds. Warning: this resets WiFi password

issues.escalation: If issue persists after all steps, call SLT support at 1212 or visit nearest SLT office

issues.title: Slow Internet Speed

steps.action: Run a speed test at speedtest.net
steps.detail: Compare result with your package speed

steps.action: Check how many devices are connected to WiFi
steps.detail: Too many devices sharing bandwidth causes slowness

steps.action: Check if any device is downloading large files
steps.detail: One device can use all bandwidth

steps.action: Move closer to the router
steps.detail: WiFi signal weakens with distance and walls

steps.action: Change WiFi channel in router settings
steps.detail: Go to 192.168.1.1 > WiFi settings > Change channel

steps.action: Check if your data limit is exceeded
steps.detail: Speed is throttled after data limit. Check at myslt.slt.lk

issues.escalation: If speed is consistently below 50% of package speed, report to 1212

issues.title: Router LOS Light Red

steps.action: Check fiber cable for damage
steps.detail: Look for bends, cuts, or crushed sections in the green cable

steps.action: Check fiber wall socket
steps.detail: Ensure cable is firmly connected to wall point

steps.action: Restart router
steps.detail: Sometimes a restart clears temporary LOS errors

steps.action: Check if there's construction near your home
steps.detail: Fiber cables can be damaged during construction

issues.escalation: LOS red usually means fiber line damage. Call 1212 immediately for technician visit

issues.title: WiFi Network Not Visible

steps.action: Check if WiFi light is on the router
steps.detail: If WiFi light is off, WiFi may be disabled

steps.action: Press WPS/WiFi button on router
steps.detail: Some routers have a physical WiFi on/off button

steps.action: Restart router
steps.detail: Unplug, wait 30 seconds, plug back in

steps.action: Check if WiFi is enabled in router settings
steps.detail: Go to 192.168.1.1 > WiFi > Enable

steps.action: Check if your device WiFi is turned on
steps.detail: Toggle airplane mode off, WiFi on

issues.escalation: If WiFi still not visible after all steps, router may need replacement. Call 1212

issues.title: Forgot WiFi Password

steps.action: Check the sticker on bottom/back of router
steps.detail: Default WiFi password is usually printed there

steps.action: Connect via ethernet cable and go to 192.168.1.1
steps.detail: Login: admin, Password: admin (or on sticker)

steps.action: Navigate to WiFi settings
steps.detail: Look for Wireless > Security > Password field

steps.action: Change password and save
steps.detail: Use a strong password with letters, numbers, symbols

issues.escalation: If you can't access router settings, factory reset using pin hole button
